description: Composition:These shoes are made of pure leatherCare: Use a branded shoe polish to keep your leather footwear clean and shinyFit:RegularGeneral:leather shoes have long been known to be the essential formal footwear. However, the current trend lists leather shoes, be it black, tan, brown or fawn, as the most versatile piece of footwear. They can also be combined with ultra-slim fit jeans and a jazzy party shirt, with gelled hair and minimal accessories so that the focus remains on the style and not the accessories. These shoes are hot! With felt upper and the zipper tongue of the shoes, the shoes are undoubtedly the style icon of the footwear world! Be fashionable and look your hottest in these red tape shoes, when worn with a shirt with psychedelic stripes and a slim fit black trousers.
